A.text: ruptures, allowing the gas to escape freely

B.text: is pulled inward toward the center

C.text: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside

D.text: dissolves and mixes with the gas

parsed.answer_value: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside
parsed.rationale: The outer shell remains intact and expands as the red internal gas expands, indicating that the shell does not rupture or dissolve but maintains its structure.
